summary: Completed testing of WorkflowAI Phase 2 features: Multi-AI model support, UI redesign (Swiss high-contrast dark theme), PDF export, and history with model_used field. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 features tested and working: Multi-model support (GET /api/models returns 3 models), model selector dropdown on dashboard, PDF export button appears after analysis, history items show model_used badge. UI redesign with Swiss high-contrast dark theme verified. Split-screen auth pages (login/register) working. Protected routes redirect correctly. Shared page handles invalid tokens.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/models - Returns 3 AI models (claude, gpt, gemini)
GET /api/workflow-history - History items include model_used field
frontend_ui_tests: Login page: Split-screen layout with branding on left, form on right
Login page: Swiss high-contrast dark theme (bg #0F172A)
Login page: Email/password inputs, Sign In button, Forgot password link, Create account link
Login flow: Admin credentials redirect to dashboard
Register page: Split-screen layout with name/email/password fields
Dashboard: Model selector dropdown with 3 options (Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Flash)
Dashboard: Workflow input textarea, Analyze button, History toggle
Dashboard: User display name (Admin), Sign Out button
Dashboard: History panel opens with previous analyses
Dashboard: History items show model_used badge (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
Dashboard: PDF export button appears after loading analysis
Dashboard: Analysis results display with Issues & Risks, Optimizations, Cost & Efficiency cards
Protected route: / redirects to /login when unauthenticated
Shared page: Invalid token shows 'Not Found' error with link to login

multi_model_support.details: GET /api/models returns 3 models: claude (Claude Sonnet 4.5), gpt (GPT-5.2), gemini (Gemini 3 Flash). Model selector dropdown on dashboard shows all 3 options.

ui_redesign.details: Swiss high-contrast dark theme with bg #0F172A. Split-screen auth pages. Clean typography with Outfit/IBM Plex Sans fonts. Feature badges on login page.

pdf_export.details: Export PDF button appears next to Analyze Workflow button after analysis is loaded. Uses html2pdf.js.

history_with_model.details: History items display model_used badge (e.g., 'Claude Sonnet 4.5'). API returns model_used field.
